features.summary: Occidental delivered strong Q4 2024 results with $1.4 billion free cash flow and record US quarterly production of 1.46 million BOE/day. The company achieved its $4.5 billion debt reduction target seven months early and announced a 9% dividend increase. Full-year 2024 production reached a record 1.33 million BOE/day with $4.9 billion in free cash flow. The Crown Rock acquisition continues outperforming expectations, and all three business segments exceeded guidance in Q4.
features.management_outlook: Management expects 2025 production to average 1.42 million BOE/day with $7.4-7.6 billion in total capital investment. The Stratos direct air capture facility is on track for commercial operations in 2025, with commissioning beginning in Q2 and ramp-up through year-end. The company maintains focus on debt reduction with $1.2 billion in announced divestitures and expects to reach the $15 billion net debt target by early 2027. Permian production is expected to grow over 15% in 2025 driven by Crown Rock integration and operational efficiencies.
features.risks: The company faces potential headwinds from reduced government support for carbon capture initiatives under the new administration, though management remains optimistic about securing necessary subsidies. OxyChem earnings are expected to decline in 2025 due to winter storm impacts, unplanned outages, higher raw material costs, and an oversupplied market in the first half. Midstream earnings may be pressured by reduced gas marketing optimization opportunities as additional takeaway capacity comes online.
features.key_drivers: Crown Rock integration is delivering significant synergies with 7% well cost reductions and over $1 million per well savings across the Midland Basin program. The company achieved 12% drilling and completion cost improvements in 2024 and expects another 7% improvement in 2025. Stratos startup represents a major milestone for the low-carbon ventures business, while Gulf of America 2.0 projects offer low-cost, long-term production growth opportunities. Operational excellence continues with record safety performance and 230% reserves replacement ratio.
